body_txt: The Boisterous Bruiser (can be a Pint-Sized Powerhouse or a Cute Bruiser ) often needs a lot of food. The Big Eater always has a burger in hand, or really wants one. The Foodie loves food . A meal isn't simply an opportunity to snarf a pound of chuck. A meal is an opportunity to imbibe, to savor, to adore. You don't just eat food, you experience food. You savor the flavor. You enjoy the notes of the spices and the regional qualities. It's a dish cooked in a certain style with food from a certain place. It's a symphony of histories that coalesces on the plate. It's sublime. Food is life. Honestly, this dude can be pretty annoying. A snob who loves to criticize you for something you don't much care about is a chore. But if he runs into a character who loves to cook? Watch out. Depending on their skills, a character like this can either be a Supreme Chef or, at worst, a Cordon Bleugh Chef or even a Lethal Chef . They might not be a chef at all, but it's more likely as it gives the character an active, rather than passive, hobby for the audience to enjoy. For good or ill, the Foodie can share their food experience through writing blogs and books, or through vlogs and social media, and may overlap being a food critic and reviewer, especially a Caustic Critic . Whether through amateur enthusiasts, pretentious elitists, or corporate shills, the new media landscape has made its mark on food as on all things. Foodies don't have to just love food, though. They might love every aspect of making food. The ingredients, the cookware, the plating... It's the entirety of the meal, not merely from soup to nuts, but from the kitchen to the dishwasher. Heck, it might even start at the farm and end at composting, which feeds the foodie's personal garden. Because food is, literally, one third of how we do not die note the other two are water and air , you can expect this to be a way for a relationship to become intimate . Or maybe porny . The Foodie may be Obsessed with Food , and the sensation of food is just as much a part of the obsession as is the actual eating of it, but enjoying food could also just be a hobby on the part of a well-rounded character, like the wine guy or the kid who collects action figures or baseball cards. They may, at some point, deliver an Ode to Food . Because they love the most exquisite and refined of foods... you can expect I'm a Humanitarian to show up from time to time. The Foodie will often come in a few types, though they may come with a soupçon note a dash, a hint, a touch of flavor of variety, and of course there are more exotic dishes.
